proposals.title: Expand daily data pull with new metrics
proposals.detail: Completed 2026-04-07. Sheet now has 26 columns including new users, organic sessions, top landing pages, page-level GSC, Ghost new members, geo %, mobile %.

proposals.title: Build Search Visibility Score (Weekly Metrics tab)
proposals.detail: Completed 2026-04-07. Weekly Metrics tab live with SVS for all 9 sites.

proposals.title: Add Looker Studio pages 2 and 3
proposals.detail: Page 2: GSC deep dive (top queries, top pages, CTR breakdown). Page 3: Ghost/email performance. Page 3 should wait until Launch Point Golf has members. Page 2 can be built once page-level GSC data is populated.

proposals.title: Expand HV market list to include Tier 2 markets
proposals.detail: Adam asked about other HV markets on 2026-04-07. Recommendation sent: add New Zealand, Germany, Netherlands, Nordic countries (Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland) as Tier 2 HV markets. Awaiting Adam's confirmation to formalise in reporting.

proposals.title: 3am daily task failed silently on 2026-04-08
proposals.detail: The 3am task ran but April 7 data was not written to sheet. Most likely cause: npm packages not installed before script execution. Fixed by adding a pre-install script to the scheduled task. Data manually recovered for April 7.
